sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description) VALUES (1, printf('Description for item %d', 1));
UPDATE test_table SET description = printf('Updated description for item %d', id) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, printf('Item %d: %s', id, description) AS formatted_description FROM test_table;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 AND description = printf('Description for item %d', 1);
